name: Frozen Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 Large Marshmallows - Cut into Small Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. With a mixer, combine the softened cream cheese and lemon juice until smooth.
2. Stir in all of the fruit and dates.
3. In a small bowl, whip the heavy cream until creamy and smooth.
4. Gently fold the whipped cream into the fruit and cream cheese mixture.
5. Pour the mixture into a loaf dish and cover with foil or plastic wrap. Place in the freezer until frozen.
